prestazioni: 4B12 MIVEC 2.4L naturally aspirated engine: Full bolt-on forced induction conversion using a Garrett GTX3071R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) paired with a Tomei 80mm titanium wastegate, custom 3-inch stainless steel turbo-back exhaust with a GReddy Revolution RS 70mm muffler, and a HKS Super Power Flow Type-R intercooler (core dimensions: 600x300x76mm) to maintain intake temps below 45°C under full boost (1.2 bar).

Engine internals reinforcement: JE FSR forged pistons (87.5mm, 10.5:1 compression ratio) with ACL Race Series bearings, Eagle H-beam connecting rods (5500 series), and a Tomei Type-M 264° duration camshaft (intake/exhaust lift: 10.5mm/10.2mm) to handle 350+ whp reliably. Oil cooling upgraded with a Setrab 19-row oil cooler (13-row for transmission) and a Moroso high-capacity oil pan (7-quart capacity).

Drivetrain and handling: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2-way) for the 4WD system, paired with a Cusco 2.5-way rear differential and a custom 3.727 final drive ratio (replacing the stock 3.937). Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (adjustable compression/rebound damping, 150mm travel) and polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (part #SPF0116K for front control arms, #SPF0117K for rear trailing arms). Braking upgraded to Endless CC-R6 rotors (330mm front, 300mm rear) with AP Racing CP8376-84 calipers and Ferodo DS2500 pads.
estetica: Liberty Walk LB Works widebody conversion kit (Delica D5-specific, 50mm front/40mm rear fender flares) with custom carbon fiber overfenders (dry carbon, 2x2 twill weave) and a Rocket Bunny rear diffuser (polyurethane, bolt-on). Front bumper replaced with a Seibon Carbon fiber Type-2 aggressive lip (pre-preg autoclave construction) and a custom aluminum skid plate (3mm thick, powder-coated matte black).

Lighting and aerodynamics: Full LED conversion with Philips Ultinon Pro9000 bulbs (6000K) for headlights, and a custom Hella Micro DE fog light setup (55W, 4500K) integrated into the front bumper. Rear wing is a custom 3-piece carbon fiber GT wing (1.8m span, 300mm chord) from 9 Lives Racing, mounted on aluminum pedestals with adjustable angle (0-15°). Side mirrors replaced with carbon fiber units from APR Performance (GT-Aero style, heated).

Interior and wheels: Full Recaro SRD-E bucket seats (fixed-back, FIA-approved) with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses, and a custom roll cage (TIG-welded 4130 chromoly, 6-point main hoop with door bars) from Custom Cages UK. Steering wheel is a Momo Prototipo (350mm, suede) with a NRG quick-release hub. Wheels are Volk Racing TE37V (18x9.5 +15 front, 18x10.5 +20 rear) with Toyo R888R tires (265/35/18 front, 295/30/18 rear).
